subject: Question about invoice amount
message: Hi, I noticed my invoice this month is a bit higher than usual. Could you help me understand what changed? I upgraded my plan two weeks ago so it might be related to that, just want to confirm.

past_tickets.subject: How to add a team member
past_tickets.resolution: Walked through admin panel steps, resolved same day

product_usage_summary: Active daily user, 3 team members on account, uses reporting feature weekly
